info.prompt:
anime art of a dreamlike moment of a 14-year-old Indian girl with sun-kissed skin and dark caramel hair, standing in a remote mountainous landscape. She wears a flowing long pink dress with delicate white floral patterns, cinched at the waist with a woven belt that accentuates her graceful frame. Her dusty sandals rest on a uneven patch of dirt dotted with sparse grasses, as she playfully lifts one hand to tuck a stray strand. The backdrop features rolling hills under a sky painted in hazy afternoon gold, with a lone eagle adding rustic charm. The mood is authentic, captured in soft focus with a slight breeze lifting her hem. watercolor textures enhance the organic aesthetic., world-class masterpiece, 4k, best quality, anime art.

Overall, it's an absolute world-class masterpiece anime-inspired artwork. It's an aesthetically pleasing anime art with impeccable attention to detail and beautiful composition.
